title: Fond farewell to KwaNonqaba's Captain Kobus
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police Station in Mossel Bay bade farewell to Captain Kobus Wolmarans in the lapa of the Mossel Bay Correctional Centre on Tuesday 30 September.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - The KwaNonqaba Police Station in Mossel Bay bade farewell to Captain Kobus Wolmarans in the lapa of the Mossel Bay Correctional Centre on Tuesday 30 September."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Wolmarans, who is retiring, dedicated 40 years to the SAPS after joining in 1985."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Wolmarans told Mossel Bay Advertiser that although he is excited to spend more time with his family, he is also a bit sad. \"It's one door closing, but another one opening,\" he said.","html":"Wolmarans told Mossel Bay Advertiser that although he is excited to spend more time with his family, he is also a bit sad. \"It's one door closing, but another one opening,\" he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"His colleagues at the station as well as the Garden Route District Commissioner, Major General Phumzile Cetyana, expressed their gratitude for his decades of service, compassion and guidance within the SAPS, and shared their well wishes for the future.","html":"His colleagues at the station as well as the Garden Route District Commissioner, Major General Phumzile Cetyana, expressed their gratitude for his decades of service, compassion and guidance within the SAPS, and shared their well wishes for the future."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"The community of KwaNonqaba will miss you,\" said Cetyana.","html":"\"The community of KwaNonqaba will miss you,\" said Cetyana."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The day took an emotional turn when Wolmarans gave a small speech of his own, saying that throughout the years, he had received a lot from the SAPS, but especially lifelong friends.","html":"The day took an emotional turn when Wolmarans gave a small speech of his own, saying that throughout the years, he had received a lot from the SAPS, but especially lifelong friends."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Watch: Wolamarans leaves the KwaNonqaba Police Station and receives a guard of honor. Video: Supplied","html":"Watch: Wolamarans leaves the KwaNonqaba Police Station and receives a guard of honor. Video: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Your browser does not support HTML5 video.","html":""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station's spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said Wolmarans had been the head of the station's visible policing unit for the past 20 years.","html":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station's spokesperson, Warrant Officer Kappie Kapp, said Wolmarans had been the head of the station's visible policing unit for the past 20 years."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"\"He was a dedicated and disciplined officer who led by example. He had an open-door policy with the community and with the other officers. He was an excellent commander who was always there to motivate his colleagues.\"","html":"\"He was a dedicated and disciplined officer who led by example. He had an open-door policy with the community and with the other officers. He was an excellent commander who was always there to motivate his colleagues.\""},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Captain Kobus Wolamarans makes his final entry into the police occurrence register. Photo: Supplied","html":"Captain Kobus Wolamarans makes his final entry into the police occurrence register. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station's commander, Lieutenant Colonel Virgie Julius, likened Wolmarans' retirement to a library filled with invaluable knowledge closing its doors, to which Wolarans replied that he would be checking in from time to time, and that the officers at the station are extremely competent.","html":"The KwaNonqaba Police Station's commander, Lieutenant Colonel Virgie Julius, likened Wolmarans' retirement to a library filled with invaluable knowledge closing its doors, to which Wolarans replied that he would be checking in from time to time, and that the officers at the station are extremely competent."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Captain Kobus Wolmarans. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz","html":"Captain Kobus Wolmarans. Photo: Gabriélla Siebritz"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sergeant Norman Cupido, Warrant Officer Felicia Josephs, Sergeant Salome Marais, Captain Kobus Wolmarans, Warrant Officer Amanda Naude, Warrant Officer Jakob ‘JC’ Brink and Sergeant Ronell Padayachee.","html":"Sergeant Norman Cupido, Warrant Officer Felicia Josephs, Sergeant Salome Marais, Captain Kobus Wolmarans, Warrant Officer Amanda Naude, Warrant Officer Jakob ‘JC’ Brink and Sergeant Ronell Padayachee."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
